series_metadata.series_description: Includes information about the testing of inaerobic bacteria such as campylobacter, botulism, and parasitology. Also includes name, age, addreess, race, sex, clinic, laboratory, medical doctor, date, type of specimen, collection date and reason for colle

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office area for one year, then transfer to the State Records Center. Retain in State Records Center for two years, then destroy., Paper: Shred
